### System Information
e.g. TrenchBroom V2.0.0-RC4 on Windows 10

You can obtain this information by launching TrenchBroom.  
Clicking on the version in the "Welcome to TrenchBroom" window will put the
version string in your clipboard.

### Crash Info
In the case of a crash, please upload the generated stack trace, log file, and
map file along with this report.
